final_prompt.prompt:
Create a digital art illustration of a deep-sea fantasy world featuring an ancient sunken civilization and a mermaid princess.

Style/medium: detailed digital painting, concept art in the style of high-fantasy underwater illustration, rich layered detail throughout
Composition: wide establishing shot with the mermaid princess centered in the mid-ground examining a rune-carved stele, ruins receding into dark background, multiple depth layers from foreground coral to distant tentacles
Subject: a mermaid princess in ancient ceremonial robes inspecting a stone tablet engraved with mysterious runes; surrounded by towering stone columns and archways encrusted with coral and sea anemones; giant bioluminescent jellyfish emitting blue-violet glow; translucent deep-sea fish with self-contained light organs; a colossal octopus extending tentacles from the far darkness
Scene/backdrop: ocean floor thousands of meters deep — a sprawling ruined city of an ancient civilization half-buried in sediment, stone arches and columns draped in coral growth, absolute darkness beyond the bioluminescent halo
Lighting/mood: no external light source; all illumination from bioluminescence — blue-violet jellyfish glow, cyan-green organism clusters, gold light points scattered like embers; mood is mysterious, dreamlike, and awe-inspiring
Color palette: deep blue-black as dominant base, accented with cyan-green and violet bioluminescent halos, warm gold light points as highlights; color contrasts create depth and wonder
Materials/textures: weathered ancient stone with moss and coral overgrowth, translucent gelatinous jellyfish membranes, iridescent fish scales, rough barnacled rock surfaces
Avoid: daylight or sunlight filtering from above, air bubbles suggesting shallow water, modern or sci-fi equipment, oversimplified backgrounds, flat lighting, washed-out colors
